inferRestTupleShortSource.tlua(3,39): error TLUA1110: Type expected.
inferRestTupleShortSource.tlua(3,39): error TLUA7019: Rest parameter 'string' implicitly has an 'any[]' type.
inferRestTupleShortSource.tlua(3,42): error TLUA100034: A vararg parameter cannot have a name.
inferRestTupleShortSource.tlua(3,48): error TLUA1005: ',' expected.
inferRestTupleShortSource.tlua(3,49): error TLUA1005: ')' expected.
inferRestTupleShortSource.tlua(3,50): error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
inferRestTupleShortSource.tlua(3,55): error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
inferRestTupleShortSource.tlua(3,55): error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'T'.
inferRestTupleShortSource.tlua(3,56): error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
inferRestTupleShortSource.tlua(3,57): error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
inferRestTupleShortSource.tlua(7,1): error TLUA2555: Expected at least 1 arguments, but got 0.
inferRestTupleShortSource.tlua(7,3): error TLUA1135: Argument expression expected.
inferRestTupleShortSource.tlua(7,4): error TLUA1135: Argument expression expected.


==== inferRestTupleShortSource.tlua (16 errors) ====
    // Regression test: tlua panics when inferring [...rest, ...T] from a tuple shorter than fixed-arity constraint
    
    function f<T extends [string]>(args: [...string[], ...T]) {
             ~
!!! error TLUA7010: 'f', which lacks return-type annotation, implicitly has an 'any' return type.
                         ~
!!! error TLUA1110: Type expected.
                                         ~
!!! error TLUA1110: Type expected.
                                          ~~~
!!! error TLUA1110: Type expected.
                                          ~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA7019: Rest parameter 'string' implicitly has an 'any[]' type.
                                             ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA100034: A vararg parameter cannot have a name.
                                                   ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ',' expected.
                                                    ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ')' expected.
                                                     ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
                                                          ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
                                                          ~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'T'.
                                                           ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
                                                            ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
      // ...
    }
    
    f([])
    ~
!!! error TLUA2555: Expected at least 1 arguments, but got 0.
!!! related TLUA6210 inferRestTupleShortSource.tlua:3:32: An argument for 'args' was not provided.
      ~
!!! error TLUA1135: Argument expression expected.
       ~
!!! error TLUA1135: Argument expression expected.
